title: Fast Entry Sheet — Expense, Income, Transfer, Split Receipt
objective: Build the single-screen FastEntrySheet bottom sheet handling all transaction types: single expense, income, account transfer, and multi-line receipt split with real-time remainder calculation.
execution_steps: Create FastEntryViewModel with StateFlow of: type (INCOME/EXPENSE/TRANSFER), amount, account, category, date, note, receiver, project(optional), splitLines[]
Build FastEntrySheet BottomSheet UI with type toggle, mandatory pickers (account, category), optional pickers (project), and split line list
Implement 'Add Split' button to dynamically add a split line (category + amount)
On Save for single transaction: call SaveTransactionUseCase (validate category+account not null)
On Save for split receipt: call SaveSplitReceiptUseCase (validate sum <= total)
On Save for transfer: show second account picker, call SaveTransferUseCase (validate distinct accounts)
Write ViewModel unit tests: remainder calculation, validation rejection (missing category, sum > total, same account transfer)
Manual check: enter 100, add split 80 Food + 20 Consumables, verify remainder = 0, save, check timeline
definition_of_done: Saving expense without Category or Account is rejected
Saving split where sum > total is rejected
Saving transfer with same source/destination is rejected
All saved rows appear in Timeline immediately
